description: A metrics question answerable directly from the retrieved org summary context.

template_vars.question: What was our total CO2e for this reporting period?

expected_response.answer: Total CO2e for this reporting period was 842.15 tonnes, made up of 512.30 tonnes from Scope 1 and 329.85 tonnes from Scope 2, across 14 uploaded batches.

description: A conceptual platform-usage question answerable from static platform-info context, not org-specific data.

template_vars.question: What emission scopes does ScopeTrace track?
template_vars.context: platform_info: ScopeTrace tracks SCOPE_1 (direct emissions, e.g. fuel combustion) and SCOPE_2 (indirect emissions from purchased energy, e.g. electricity) today; SCOPE_3 (value chain) is not yet a supported activity type.

expected_response.answer: ScopeTrace currently tracks Scope 1 (direct emissions, such as fuel combustion) and Scope 2 (indirect emissions from purchased energy, such as electricity). Scope 3 (value chain emissions) is not yet a supported activity type.

description: An honest 'not enough context' case -- the retrieved context has no Scope 3 data at all, so the assistant must flag the answer as unsupported rather than guessing.

template_vars.question: What was our Scope 3 total this quarter?

expected_response.answer: The retrieved context only breaks emissions down into Scope 1 and Scope 2 totals; it does not include a Scope 3 figure, so I can't confidently answer this question from the available data.
